hero.art_prompt: Sneha, an 18 year old Indian commerce student, confident and happy studying accounts and finance on a laptop, modern home, aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Sneha loved balancing accounts and tracking money.
panels.dialogue: Numbers just make sense to me.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha, 18, happily working on accounts in a ledger and laptop at home, curious and engaged, tidy room.

panels.narration: But a finance career needed a real degree.
panels.dialogue: How do I turn this into a job?
panels.img_prompt: Sneha looking thoughtful, wondering how to build a finance career, a laptop open in front of her, modest room.

panels.narration: Then she found a B.Com in Accounting & Finance, online.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha's face lighting up with excitement at a laptop showing a B.Com in Accounting and Finance, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: She enrolled and began mastering the craft.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha confidently starting her first accounting lesson on a laptop, notebook and calculator beside her, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why A B.Com In Accounting & Finance
points: Master the real craft: accounting, taxation, auditing and financial management.
Apply real finance tools and included micro-credentials from your very first semester.
₹1,35,000 for the full 3-year B.Com (₹45,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ B.Com that employers and CA/CMA paths recognise.

testimonials.name: Sneha Iyer
testimonials.quote: I always loved accounts. This degree turned that into a real finance career path.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: Learning real finance tools from semester one made me genuinely job-ready.

testimonials.name: Aman Gupta
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI let me start right after 12th instead of waiting years to save up.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised B.Com plus real accounting skills got me hired into a finance role quickly.

facts.v: 0% interest EMI from about ₹3,750/month, or an education loan
UGC-entitled online B.Com, NAAC A++ accredited
